findings.title: Wrong table key in registerStoreRefresh call
findings.why_it_matters: syncEngine._storeRefreshRegistry.get(entry.dexieTable) is called with the Dexie table name ('studySessions'). Registering with 'study_sessions' (Supabase name) means the callback is stored under a key that never matches. Downloaded studySessions records will be applied to Dexie but the Zustand store will never be refreshed — stale UI after sync, silently broken.
findings.suggested_fix: Change 'study_sessions' to 'studySessions' (the Dexie table name, matching tableRegistry.ts dexieTable field)
evidence: syncEngine.download.test.ts:412: syncEngine.registerStoreRefresh('notes', ...) — note uses dexieTable name

residual_risks: The test for store refresh registration asserts the table name is 'study_sessions' which will also pass incorrectly — both the implementation and the test use the wrong key, so the test does not catch the bug
testing_gaps: Test 'registers store refresh with table name study_sessions' uses the wrong expected value and should also be corrected to 'studySessions'
